meaning: n.转送者,传达人,传导物,发报机,话筒,发射机,让渡者
examples: Rather than plugging a cable into a shoe, the Wisconsin researchers suggest installing a wireless transmitter in the heel.
Emphasis was placed on the school as a transmitter of moral values.
Sensors record each movement and send it by an ankle transmitter to a smart phone.
This information is encrypted within the Smartpen and then sent out through an infrared transmitter.
Radio Guintan, a station for women, had all its transmitter towers in the region destroyed.
